system.description:
"Dual wielding, huh? Watch this!"

Class Complexity: ♦♦◇◇

LEVEL 3

Bladebearer. Your weapons wielded with your Psionic Field are considered dual wielded. When you gain Strain while using Psionic Strike, add the Strain Die as damage.

LEVEL 7

Bladestorm. (1/encounter) Others within your Psionic Field take KEY damage for each space they move (or are moved) this round. +2 Strain.

LEVEL 11

Shieldstorm. You may wield 2 additional shields with your Psionic Field. Gain 1 Strain to allow an ally to use one for a round.

LEVEL 15

Bladestorm (2). You may wield 2-handed weapons with your Psionic Field; they are considered tri-wielded (1/round you may roll with advantage 2 with them).
